ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the passenger survived (1) or did not survive (0) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 = 1st, 2 = 2nd, 3 = 3rd) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (male, female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* Lifeboat number (if applicable) */,
  "body_number" TEXT /* Body number (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "travel_companion" TEXT /* Travel companion(s) of the passenger */,
  "home_destination" TEXT /* Home destination of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_body_number FOREIGN KEY ("body_number") REFERENCES bodies ("body_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_lifeboat FOREIGN KEY ("lifeboat") REFERENCES lifeboats ("lifeboat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "average_fare" REAL /* Average fare of the class */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifeboats" (
  "lifeboat_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each lifeboat */,
  "lifeboat_number" TEXT /* Number of the lifeboat */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the lifeboat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lifeboat */,
  "launch_time" TEXT /* Time when the lifeboat was launched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifeboat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bodies" (
  "body_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each body */,
  "body_number" TEXT /* Number assigned to the body */,
  "recovered_by" TEXT /* Ship or organization that recovered the body */,
  "burial_site" TEXT /* Burial site or disposition of the body */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the body */,
  "burial_date" TEXT /* Date the body was buried */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "research_topic" TEXT /* Research topic of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger whose data was accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_sources" (
  "ps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "source_date" TEXT /* Date the data source was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_sources_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
column_names: Indicates whether the passenger survived (1) or did not survive (0)
Port of embarkation (C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton)
Total number of seats in the class
Time when the lifeboat was launched
Ship or organization that recovered the body
Burial site or disposition of the body
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the passenger whose data was accessed
ID of the researcher accessing the data
Date when the data was accessed
Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze)
Unique identifier for each data source
Date the data source was last updated
Date the data source was used
